title: Power BI Matrix and Table Advanced Patterns — Conditional Formatting, Grand Totals, Drill-Through, Sparklines

confirmed_facts.fact: Security reporting matrix layout: Rows = MetricDim[MetricName], Columns = DateTable[MonthYear] (sorted by MonthSort), Values = [Metric Value]. Optionally add [MoM Change %] as second value. Set MetricDim[SortOrder] as Sort by Column for row ordering.

Conditional formatting: Background color Rules (Format > Cell elements > Background color > fx > Rules), Icon sets (Icons > fx > Rules with Layout = 'Data only'), Color scale gradients (Gradient mode), Data bars (proportional bars in cells).

Grand totals in a matrix are recalculated by re-running the measure with filters removed (not by summing visible cells). Use ISINSCOPE(column) to detect row grouping vs total level and override the grand total calculation.
Power BI natively supports sparklines in Table and Matrix visuals. Add via Visualizations pane > 'Add a sparkline' in Values area. Set fixed Y-axis min/max for consistent scaling across rows.
Conditional formatting rules applied to percentage measures operate on the underlying decimal (0.05), not the display value (5%). Set rules based on the decimal number.

implementation_notes:
Matrix field well setup:
- Rows: MetricDim[MetricName] (set Sort by Column = MetricDim[SortOrder])
- Columns: DateTable[MonthYear] (set Sort by Column = DateTable[MonthSort])
- Values: [Metric Value], optionally [MoM Change %]

Limit visible months: page-level filter DateTable[MonthSort] Top N 12 DESC, or relative date filter on DateTable[Date] last 12 months.

Delta column with arrow label:
```dax
MoM Label =
    VAR _Chg = [MoM Change %]
    RETURN IF(ISBLANK(_Chg), "",
           IF(_Chg > 0, "▲ " & FORMAT(_Chg, "+0.0%"),
           IF(_Chg < 0, "▼ " & FORMAT(_Chg, "0.0%"), "→ 0.0%")))
```

Conditional formatting setup:

Background color rules on count column:
1. Select matrix > Format pane > Cell elements > select series
2. Background color > On > fx
3. Rules: If >= 100 → #FF4444 (Red), If >= 50 → #FFC000 (Amber), else → #70AD47 (Green)

Icon sets for RAG column:
1. Cell elements > Icons > On > fx
2. Style: circles, Layout: Data only
3. Based on field: [RAG Status] measure
4. Rules: If = 2 → Red, If = 1 → Amber, If = 0 → Green

RAG helper measure:
```dax
RAG Icon Value =
    VAR _Val = [Metric Value]
    VAR _Chg = [MoM Change %]
    RETURN IF(ISBLANK(_Val), BLANK(),
           IF(_Chg > 0.1 || _Val > 100, 2,
           IF(_Chg > 0 || _Val > 50, 1, 0)))
```

Grand total overrides with ISINSCOPE:
```dax
// Show custom grand total (e.g. MAX instead of SUM)
Metric Value Custom Total =
    IF(ISINSCOPE(MetricDim[MetricName]),
        SUM(SecuritySnapshots[Value]),
        MAXX(VALUES(MetricDim[MetricName]), [Metric Value]))

// Show blank at total level
Metric Value No Total =
    IF(ISINSCOPE(MetricDim[MetricName]), [Metric Value], BLANK())
```

Suppress totals entirely: Format pane > Row subtotals > Off, or Column subtotals > Off.

Drill-through from matrix to detail:
1. Create 'Detail' page
2. Drag MetricDim[MetricName] + DateTable[MonthYear] to Drill through field well
3. Add table visual with individual records on Detail page
4. On Summary: right-click matrix cell > Drill through > Detail
5. Back button is auto-generated (Action > Type = Back)

Cross-report drill-through: File > Options > Report settings > 'Allow visuals to use drill through from other reports'

Sparkline setup:
1. Select Table/Matrix visual
2. Visualizations pane > Values > Add sparkline (chart icon)
3. Measure: [VulnCount], Axis: DateTable[MonthYear]
4. Format > Sparklines > Y-axis > set fixed min=0, max for consistent comparison
5. Layout: Metric | Latest Count | MoM% | Trend (sparkline)
caveats: Not setting Sort by Column on MonthYear causes months to appear alphabetically (Apr, Aug, Dec...)
Conditional formatting rules on percentages use underlying decimal (0.05 not 5%) — set thresholds accordingly
Grand total summing metrics that shouldn't be summed (e.g. rating scores) — use ISINSCOPE to override
Drill-through field placed in Filters pane instead of Drill through field well silently fails
Matrix shows '(Blank)' column when fact rows have no matching DateTable row — check relationships
24+ column periods make matrix unusable — limit to 12-13 months with slicer or filter
Multiple measures in same Values position all adopt the first measure's format string — use separate measures with explicit FORMAT()
